_status: machine-drafted, unreviewed — signing gate before any published instance

general_survival_months: a year and a half after closing

counter_families.expected_redline_text: General representations and warranties survive for 18 months after closing, and fundamental representations survive for six years or the longest period permitted by law.

acceptable.text: General representations survive 18 months and fundamental representations survive six years; claim notice is 30 days and responses are due in 60 days.

unacceptable.text: All representations, including fundamental representations, expire after six months; claim notice is 30 days and responses are due in 60 days.

counter_families.expected_redline_text: At closing, 10% of the Purchase Price will be deposited in escrow and held for at least 12 months to secure Seller indemnification obligations.

acceptable.text: At closing, 10% of the Purchase Price enters escrow for 12 months to secure Seller indemnification; notice is 5 days and review is 30 days.

unacceptable.text: At closing, 2% of the Purchase Price enters an account that does not secure Seller indemnification; notice is 5 days and review is 30 days.

benign_change_templates.text: The parties confirm that Delaware law governs this Agreement.
The parties confirm that signing and closing will occur simultaneously.

novel_deviation_templates.text: Buyer irrevocably waives every claim based on fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.
